descriptionInUI: Runtime half of the carrier deck decorations (feature 72): strikes each boat's LAUNCH-PHASE deck statics below (silent despawn -- the elevator ride) before recovery, so dressing like the round-down E-2C can stand in the recovery corridor during the launch cycle without ever meeting a jet in the wires. Clears on a fallback timer or the moment friendly fixed-wing traffic appears low astern of the boat, whichever comes first. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.deckDecor (the 'Carrier deck aircraft statics' setting placed launch-phase dressing). Despawn only -- no spawns, no gameplay-model change.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Fallback clear time (minutes after mission start)
